disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New, rapidly progressive loss of vision at the outer edges of both sides over about 48 hours, with the patient bumping into objects on the far left and far right
trigger_question_examples: Tell me exactly what you can and can't see — is it the sides, the centre, one eye or both?
When did the trouble seeing to the sides start, and is it getting worse?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's the outer edges on both sides — I keep clipping doorframes on the left and the right. It's come on over the last two days and it feels like it's getting worse.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe acute worsening over 48 hours of a long-standing dull headache located behind and around both eyes
trigger_question_examples: Where is the headache and how bad is it compared with your usual headaches?
Has anything about the headache changed recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a dull headache for ages but the last two days it's been throbbing badly right behind both eyes — much worse than usual.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spontaneous bilateral milky breast discharge in a woman who is not pregnant and not breastfeeding
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the breast leaking — one side or both, what colour, and are you pregnant or breastfeeding?
Does the discharge happen on its own or only when pressed?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both breasts are leaking a milky white fluid on their own and when I press lightly. I'm definitely not pregnant and not breastfeeding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Secondary amenorrhoea — menstrual periods stopped around 12 months ago and have not returned
trigger_question_examples: When was your last period, and have your cycles changed?
Any change in your periods over the last year?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My periods stopped about a year ago and haven't come back. I didn't think much of it until now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Loss of libido and two-year history of inability to conceive despite unprotected intercourse
trigger_question_examples: Has your interest in sex changed?
Have you been trying for a pregnancy, and for how long?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Honestly I've had no interest in sex for a while, and we've been trying for a baby for two years with no luck.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no neck stiffness and no vomiting reported (pertinent negatives that lower but do not exclude an acute intracranial catastrophe)
trigger_question_examples: Any fever, neck stiffness, or vomiting?
Have you been sick or noticed a stiff neck?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever, my neck feels fine, and I haven't been vomiting.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No use of antipsychotics, metoclopramide or other dopamine-blocking medicines that could otherwise raise prolactin
trigger_question_examples: Are you on any regular medicines, including anything for mood, psychosis or nausea?
Any tablets like metoclopramide or antipsychotics?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't take any regular medicines at all — nothing for mood or nausea.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Patient is frightened to walk around the house because of the new blind edges on both sides (high fall risk from the visual deficit)
trigger_question_examples: How is this affecting getting around at home?
Do you feel safe moving about the house right now?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm scared to move around — I keep walking into things on both sides and I'm worried I'll trip and fall.
